title: User data fields lost during authentication in Xano
symptom: When authenticating a user in the Weweb editor, certain fields like name and email are lost while others remain intact.
not_this_if: Issue does not occur outside the Weweb editor
All fields are retained during authentication
root_cause: Xano uses Full Object replacement for updates, which means that when a single field is updated, all other fields in the record are reset to their default values unless explicitly included in the update request.
fix_steps: Use the 'first_notempty' filter in Xano to update only specific fields
Ensure that all necessary fields are included in the update request
agent_instruction: Apply the 'first_notempty' filter in Xano to update only the required fields without losing others.
